nodes.name: Neuropsychological Effects
nodes.summary: Cognition, mild cognitive impairment, mood, and well-being outcomes related to tadalafil or closely bounded PDE5-inhibitor evidence.
scope_notes: Keep healthy-adult cognition, clinical cognitive impairment, and mood/well-being evidence separate unless a study directly measures multiple domains.
Do not infer clinical cognitive benefit from vasodilation or animal data without human outcome evidence.

nodes.name: Cardiometabolic And Physical Effects
nodes.summary: Cardiovascular, endothelial, blood-pressure, exercise, physical-function, and longevity-relevant outcomes.
scope_notes: Separate validated clinical outcomes from surrogate biomarkers.
Treat pulmonary-hypertension and erectile-dysfunction populations as indirect for healthy men age 30 to 50 unless the claim is explicitly scoped to those populations.

nodes.name: Safety And Evidence Directness
nodes.summary: Adverse effects, contraindications, interactions, dose/exposure directness, and translational mechanisms needed to interpret off-label evidence.
scope_notes: Safety review must use current regulatory labeling and clinical evidence rather than only benefit-oriented study reports.
Mechanistic findings should be tagged as mechanism unless human clinical endpoints are directly measured.

nodes.name: Cognition In Healthy Adults
nodes.summary: Human evidence on tadalafil and cognitive performance, attention, memory, executive function, or brain-perfusion proxies in healthy or mostly healthy adults, with special interest in men age 30 to 50.
scope_notes: Primary target population: healthy men age 30 to 50.
Include non-tadalafil PDE5-inhibitor studies only as adjacent evidence and mark drug-class transfer limits.
Do not merge acute dosing and chronic daily use without dose-duration labeling.

nodes.name: Mild Cognitive Impairment And Cognitive Decline
nodes.summary: Evidence on tadalafil or PDE5 inhibitors for mild cognitive impairment, dementia-risk populations, cognitive decline, or neurovascular cognitive outcomes.
scope_notes: Separate MCI or dementia-risk populations from healthy-adult cognition.
Observational association evidence must not be written as treatment efficacy.
Capture age, baseline cognitive status, comorbidities, and indication for PDE5-inhibitor use.

nodes.name: Mood, Well-Being, And Quality Of Life
nodes.summary: Evidence on tadalafil-associated mood, subjective well-being, anxiety/depression measures, vitality, sleep-adjacent outcomes, or quality of life beyond sexual-function endpoints.
search_aliases: Cialis quality of life depression anxiety
scope_notes: Distinguish direct mood/well-being measures from indirect improvements mediated by ED, BPH, or relationship outcomes.
Record whether instruments are validated and whether sexual-function improvement confounds the outcome.

nodes.name: Cardiovascular Health And Endothelial Function
nodes.summary: Evidence on tadalafil and cardiovascular outcomes, endothelial function, vascular stiffness, blood pressure, perfusion, metabolic-vascular markers, or vascular risk.
scope_notes: Separate clinical cardiovascular outcomes from surrogate vascular markers.
Always capture baseline cardiovascular risk and concurrent antihypertensive, nitrate, alpha-blocker, or alcohol exposure when reported.

nodes.name: Exercise Capacity And Physical Function
nodes.summary: Evidence on tadalafil effects on exercise capacity, physical performance, altitude physiology, recovery, fatigue, or functional status.
scope_notes: Distinguish healthy performance studies from pulmonary-hypertension functional-outcome evidence.
Record altitude, training status, dose timing, and exercise protocol.

nodes.name: Longevity, Healthspan, And Biomarkers
nodes.summary: Evidence on tadalafil and longevity-relevant outcomes such as mortality, morbidity, inflammation, endothelial aging, metabolic health, or validated healthspan proxies.
scope_notes: Treat longevity as unsupported unless sources measure mortality, morbidity, aging-related endpoints, or validated surrogate pathways.
Do not let biomarker movement imply healthspan benefit unless the source or surrounding evidence validates the endpoint.

nodes.name: Safety, Interactions, And Adverse Events
nodes.summary: Evidence and current labeling on tadalafil risks, adverse effects, contraindications, drug interactions, dose limits, and risk-benefit interpretation for off-label use.
scope_notes: Use the latest labeling as the baseline safety reference before interpreting off-label benefit.
Capture absolute risk, event seriousness, dose/exposure, interacting medicines, and patient risk factors when available.
Do not publish benefit claims without nearby safety caveats.

nodes.name: Mechanistic And Translational Evidence
nodes.summary: Mechanistic evidence on PDE5 inhibition, nitric oxide/cGMP signaling, cerebral or vascular perfusion, mitochondrial, inflammatory, or tissue-level pathways relevant to off-label hypotheses.
search_aliases: PDE5 inhibition cerebral blood flow mechanism
scope_notes: Mechanistic evidence can support plausibility, not clinical efficacy, unless directly tied to human outcomes.
Tag animal, in vitro, and non-tadalafil PDE5-inhibitor evidence as indirect.
